Index

_ | A | C | F | G | I | K | M | N | O | S | W

_

  • __call__() (pygrog.calib.GrogInterpolator method)
    • (pygrog.gadgets.OffResonanceSparseFFT method)
    • (pygrog.gadgets.SubspaceSparseFFT method)
    • (pygrog.operator.SparseFFT method)
  • _adjoint_flat() (pygrog.operator.SparseFFT method)
  • _adjoint_impl() (pygrog.gadgets.SubspaceSparseFFT method)
  • _adjoint_packed() (pygrog.operator.SparseFFT method)
  • _adjoint_pipeline() (pygrog.operator.SparseFFT method)

    • (pygrog.gadgets.SubspaceSparseFFT method)
    • (pygrog.operator.SparseFFT method)
  • _adjoint_single_dual() (pygrog.gadgets.SubspaceSparseFFT method)
  • _b_view() (pygrog.gadgets.OffResonanceCorrection method)
  • _ensure_bins() (pygrog.operator.SparseFFT method)
  • _fft_pad_gather() (pygrog.operator.SparseFFT method)

    • (pygrog.gadgets.SubspaceSparseFFT method)

  • _mrpro_class (pygrog.interop.GrogLinearOp attribute)
  • _normal_no_toep() (pygrog.operator.SparseFFT method)
